full_text:
Yu Digen
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Digen. A leader of Black Mountain Bandits, he was noted for having a lot of hair. Killed by Yuan Shao. Yu Digen was a bandit Yu Digen lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
